response.original_title: Jeg har det ikke så godt – Fem samtaler om psykisk smerte
response.overview: I'm not okay. Actually, I'm feeling really bad. In fact, I feel so bad that I want to kill myself. How do I tell my loved ones? How will they react?  That’s what 26-year-old Clara is trying to figure out through five conversations, each of which offers insight into her mental state and her relationships with those around her.
response.title: I’m not okay – Five conversations about emotional pain
